name: Amis, James W.
description: He was never precise in promise keeping.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Bishop, Mark
description: A fine little fellow, honest, intelligent and kind.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Braswell, Margaret
description: A daughter of the gods, Divinely tall and fair, divinely fair.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Campbell, Kate
description: Thought does not become a young woman. Kate has searched many years to find a vocation and since joining the Rifle Club has decided to become a soldier.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Campbell, Martha
motto: "The smile that blest one lover's heart has broken many more."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Cantrall, G. A.
description: His mind his kingdom and his will his law.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Casey, John E.
clubs: President of Y. M. C. A. '16-'17
description: Formed on the good old plan, A true and brave and downright honest man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Cheery, Rufus L.
description: A young man with a bright future. Always has a smile and stands well with the ladies.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Clark, J. A.
motto: "The heights by great men reached and kept were not attained by sudden flight, But they while their companions slept were toiling upward in the night."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Douthit, Jesse C.
clubs: Secretary-Treasurer of A. I. E. E. '17-'18
description: The mildest manners with the bravest mind. A ladies' man. Has many dates.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Dowell, Gladys
clubs: Vice-President of the Home Economics Club
description: Gladys is the girl to be depended upon, Whether the call be for work or for fun.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Dyer, J. M.
description: A sturdy son of the good old soil who can use his brain as well as his hands.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Evans, A. O.
description: It must be done like lightning. He is in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Faisst, Herbert
motto: "He did with cheerful will what others talked of while their hands were still."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Gilbreath, Bernice
motto: "A woman nobly planned, Born to warn, comfort, and command."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Gold, Marjorie
motto: "Oh, call it by some other name, for friendship sounds too cold."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Greaves, Bernice
description: As fair a lady as you ever met, But she has become a suffragette.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Hay, W. C.
description: For four years a student and a professional man as well. Who else could do it?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Heath, I. J.
description: A politician with many virtues. He is a farmer, yet he sings well.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Heerwagen, P. K.
description: P. K. makes a good many visits on Dixon street. We wonder when he goes. He is a good student and craves agriculture.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Hemphill, Mary
description: If there is anything better than to be loved it is to love. Mary is an all-round college girl.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Hoeltzel, Pauline
description: Her eyes dance always with a merry laugh. She deserves her many friends.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Hollabaugh, Gladys
description: Sedate and modest, yet full of fun, Appears like an angel, but ain't yet one.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Mccoy, Aileen
description: They call upon her when they want it well done.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_04.png

name: McDonald, Dorothy
motto: "The loud laugh that bespeaks the vacant mind."
description: Dorothy may be heard if not seen at any time about the Book Store.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: McGaughy, J. P.
motto: "Great things through greatest hazards are achieved; and then they shine."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Middlebrooks, Pearl
motto: "I am whatever was, is, or will be."
description: Pearl makes A's and plays the ukelele.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Mitchell, W. M.
motto: "Providence provides for me and I am well content."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Moody, J. C.
motto: "It is not strength but art obtains the prize, And to be swift is less than to be wise."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Morgan, R. E.
motto: "Of no man's presence he feels afraid, At no man's question looks dismayed."
description: He makes frequent visits to Askew's. Why?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Nelson, Irene
description: Irene has always been a faithful student and will be remembered for her true worth.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: O'Bar, Blanche
description: Strong in character with businesslike promptness.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: O'Neal, E. P.
motto: "For he by geometric scale Could take the size of pot and pail, And wisely tell what hour of the day The clock does strike by algebra."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Parker, E. L.
description: He wears a bashful look, but watch him get the money.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Prothro, R. E.
description: How can he be such an Ec shark and fuss the ladies so?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Ramsey, Adele
description: Love was not meant for people in their wits. Adele is strong for the farmer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Rankin, F. S.
motto: "A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance."
clubs: Secretary of Y. M. C. A. '17-'18
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Robison, H. H.
motto: "I am always in haste, but never in a hurry." Why? Because he is an electrical engineer.
clubs: Vice-President of A. I. E. E. '17-'18
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Sailor, Lela
motto: "WANTED—Someone to appreciate my importance."
clubs: President of Young Women's Honor League
description: A master mind with a trend toward politics.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Stevenson, E. E.
motto: "For he who is honest is noble, whatever his fortunes or birth." Steve dictates to the offenders against the dorm council.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Wilson, Margaret
description: None was ever jollier to have that added virtue, a well-brained mind.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Wilson, William
description: Bill is some football player. We see someone wearing an "A" sweater with three service stripes.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Winfrey, George W.
motto: "And still they gazed and still the wonder grew, That one small head could carry all he knew."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Howell, Ruth
motto: "My kingdom for an Agri, they are so independent."
clubs: President of Y. W. C. A.
description: There is no necessity for pushing when you have a pull.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Alewine, Boyce
description: He took good care of Jimmie's furniture; such good care that Jimmie himself was unable to find it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Alexander, Margaret
motto: "A good disposition is more valuable than gold."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Alter, G. K.
motto: "I did not make my A, but I gave the fellow who beat me a good race."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Atkinson, Pearl
motto: "Common sense in an uncommon degree is what the world calls wisdom."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Bailey, Frances
motto: "Proper dignity always the rule."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Beard, S. J.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Beard, Mrs. S. J.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Belknap, Ray
clubs: Coaches those who are not able to make the correct impressions in their Calculus classes
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Browne, Ada
motto: "Because I know for me my work is best."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Bradley, J. E.
description: Jim has let his Hill Hall environment lead him the wrong way.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Cantrall, W. M.
description: The very life of the dormitory board of censorship.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Coleman, J. W.
description: He will hit the Germans just as hard as he hit his opponent in a football game and that is more than any German can stand.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Cole, Nell
motto: "Light hearts live long."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Conley, George D.
motto: "Think I'll join the Navy and keep up the reputation of the Admiral."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Davidson, Gene
description: "Boys, all I like about this dormitory council business is that I can do as I please and get by with it."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Dibrell, Artilla
motto: "Care smiles to see her free from care, And hard hearts love her unaware."
description: See Junior writeup.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Evatt, Estelle
motto: "All the genius I have is the fruit of labor and thought."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Ellison, Fred
motto: "If Dr. Nourse didn't talk so far above my head, I believe I could pass this course."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Felton, Ruth
description: See sophomore writeup.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Furr, Beatrice
motto: "Shine out, little head, sunning over with curls."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Fincher, L. G.
description: The guy that put Waldo on the map.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Harrell, W. M.
motto: "What's worth doing at all is worth doing well."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Gilliam, Eleanor
motto: "For I am but a simple, guileless girl."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hart, Ethel
motto: "I'm just in love with all the boys."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Hendrix, Agnes Belle
motto: "No one but she and Heaven knows of what she's thinking."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hays, Brooks
description: Editor-in-Chief. What else do you want to know?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hinds, Hubert
description: Stars in "Ec 12" because of his knowledge of horticulture.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hilton, Amelia
motto: "Thus neglecting worldly ends for the closeness and bettering of my mind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Hodges, Bess
motto: "Just the airiest, fairest slip of a girl."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Johnson, Madge
description: She cooks the things that Mother used to make.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Kuykendall, S. J.
motto: "He's in the army now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Kennard, R. C.
description: A detective of note. Has been accused of being a Senior.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Lee, W. M.
motto: "I have three brothers in the army and there is nothing for me to do but to follow after them."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Knott, John
motto: "Sis Cow, she lay low and say nothin'."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Locke, D. A.
description: A demon with the ladies and a man of note in the military world.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Logan, R. L.
motto: "You just think you have a date with Bess."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Machen, Hughes
description: The class politician who usually gets what he wants.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Love, George
description: George paid the penalty of his crime by serving as a private on the Mexican border.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McBride, Lillie Mae
motto: "The blue of her eyes beats the blue of the skies."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McCaleb, T. M.
description: We wonder how he can remain such a staunch bachelor and still room with Hooker.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_13.png

name: McLachlan, R. L.
description: Looks good in his striped uniform. He made a fortune on the world series.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: McCullough, Gladys
motto: "Nothing ever, hardly ever, troubles me."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: McMurtry, Olivette
motto: "When study interferes with a good time, cut out the study."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: McIlroy, Mertye
description: Quiet and demure, but wise for all that.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Mullins, W. E.
motto: "Come over on the sunny side of life."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Miller, Alma
motto: "A type of noble womanhood."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Mulrennin, Cass
description: A fullback that every true Razorback all but worships.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Morrow, Franklin H.
description: Champion rat catcher of Gray Hall.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Nisbett, J. M.
description: The medical world will be proud of him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Neely, Virginia
motto: "So she grew a noble lady and the people loved her much."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Payne, E. R.
description: Expects to get there by continual booting. Surprises Dr. Drake by his excellence in Geology.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Pratt, Evangeline
motto: "Don't wake me up; I am dreaming."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Reed, C. A.
description: Great on account of his ability to drag himself out of any dilemma into which he may have dragged himself. Ask Prof. Murphy.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Ragsdale, J. G.
description: The pride of Union county.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Rice, A. W.
description: The sturdy wrestling coach.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Russell, Jean
motto: "A quiet, modest maid."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Ross, Una
motto: "How pleasant it is, at the close of the day, no follies to have to repent."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Sanders, C. B.
description: "Sandy" is there in a pinch. Makes his best grades in Campustry.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Sailor, Mrs. V. L.
motto: "The way to be loyal to Uncle Sam is to fall in love with a soldier man."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Smith, Isabella
motto: "There are few doors through which liberality, joined with a good disposition, cannot find its way."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Searcy, R. L.
description: Has had only one date in three years. Matches pennies for pay.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Smith, Lyle
description: He played with a broken arm, but he showed his opponent that his strength all went to his other arm.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Shumaker, C. A.
description: The guy with the enviable laugh.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Stewart, Olive
motto: "Success comes to those who lead a life of endeavor."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Taylor, Beloit
description: If he does not make a hit with that cute pompadour and by his athletic attainments, he is lost.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: York, H. A.
description: He made the Agri day what it was, and that is saying a good deal.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Turner, W. O.
description: He made such stirring addresses that no one dared try to defeat him for the presidency.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Bradley, M. M.
description: A bold, bad man from Oklahoma.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Walker, Byrnes
description: If the war will only leave me alone, the whole world will some day be proud of me.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Alford, T. Elbert
description: The best freshman among the sophomores.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Barrett, Lois
description: The merry laugh that wins friends.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Barrett, Joe
description: A willing worker and a fine fellow.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Baskin, Clara
description: Erstwhile schoolma'am.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bennett, Lucy
description: She wants to know why "Little Brother" flits from hill to hill.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bishop, Thelma
motto: "Nothing is impossible to a willing mind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Boysen, Mae
motto: "A southern wind has blown us fair Mae. No other, we hope, will take her away."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Bridewell, Effie Mae
description: Frankly independent, but lovable.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Briscoe, Gladys
description: The gym star.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Browning, Ethel
description: She greatly despises a camouflage.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Carroll, Mamie
motto: "I want no uproar, I'm a quiet girl."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Carnall, Frances
description: Never hurries, never worries.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Chotard, Elizabeth
description: She does not live in China, but she surely likes her "Rice".
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Clark, Harry
description: A tennis expert—especially in love games.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Clifton, Artie
description: She may regret her silence, but never her speech.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Coker, Edith
motto: "Now some girls do giggle and others do chatter, But I give my time to more serious matter."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Coleman, C. R.
description: A cheer leader in public; in private a home-breaker (almost).
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Collamore, L. J.
description: A fine fellow. Responded to the call of the colors.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Cooper, R. A.
description: A reformed bachelor and a hard working student.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Conner, E. C.
description: He can't help it because his eyes are mellow brown.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Cotton, Nina
motto: "Care is an enemy to life."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Cox, Jesse
description: Ye president. Understands freshmen and vice versa.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Cress, Roscoe
description: That fellow of dignified mien and businesslike voice.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Cravens, Pauline
motto: "I am resolved to grow fat and stay young till forty."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Dean, Margie
motto: "Nothing so becomes a woman as modest stillness and humility."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Evans, J. S.
description: "Say, fellows, I'll tell you what; let's . . ." Loves Calculus.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Evans, Hugh
description: Orator, politician, student.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Falconer, F. Armistead
description: Vest pocket Beau Brummel.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Fincher, Guy
description: A quiet stranger. Left at mid-term.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Fincher, Gwin
motto: "Merrily, merrily, shall I live now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gaffney, Claude
description: Had one "swell" time this year; if it was in the Infirmary.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gatewood, E. M.
description: Has made a close study of women's hearts.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gee, Stayton
description: When he smiles, he grins.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gold, Paul
description: Good looking; a football hero... need we say more?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gosden, W. E.
description: A very "dexterous" man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Govan, Doll
description: Happiness consists of Hugh, a car, and a package of gum.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Gregg, Carolyn
description: Fair, modest flower; quite proficient in the art of winning everybody's heart.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harper, La Verne
motto: "Kenneth, is it Polly tonight?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harrell, Ruth
description: Nothing could cause her to hurry.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harrison, Clyrene
description: Carnall Hall will never need a player piano as long as she is around.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Harrington, Jeanette
motto: "She was just the quiet kind whose natures never vary."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Hassell, Eugene G.
description: Some musician. Tickles the ivory for pastime.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Hays, H. F.
description: Dr. Foreman's pet.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Henry, Floyd
description: He runs a Henry.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hollabaugh, Ernest
description: Don't confuse with the Arkansas beauty.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hon, Sarah
description: She imposes on her own good nature.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Hood, Edna
description: When Bill is out of town she knits to pass the time away.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Imon, Niel
description: Sometimes he seems to be Hooded in oblivion.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Irby, Annie
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Irby, Pet
description: Lately changed to H. E. course. She is preparing herself for the future.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Knight, Wm. Jackson
description: The author of Frisco Shine, and an otherwise intelligent young man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Knoch, Lester
motto:
"I am content, I do not care,
Wag as it will, the world for me."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Kone, Evelyn
motto: "Some secret charm does all her acts attend."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Lake, Mary
motto: "I envy those who know me more than I pity those who know me less."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Lake, Winfred
description: Afraid of the girls.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Lambert, Betty
description: Her ideal ... to dress her charms and to make herself beloved.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Lawson, E. H.
description: Into everything. Speaks broken English fluently.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Lee, Cornelia
description: A blonde maiden, fair to look upon.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Locke, D. Archibald
motto: "Sweetness long drawn out."
description: Aspires to be an Artillery captain.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Lockharte, Mildred
description: Baby face, a baby's smile, but not a baby's stature.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Logan, Lilline
description: A cheerful temper.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Maddox, Lila Mae
description: Has a heart of steel.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Markwell, Kenneth
motto: "Who stole my cap?"
description: He is responsible for this sophomore sarcasm.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Marshall, Maxine
description: With eyes that look into the very soul.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Matthews, Verda Parks
description: Her highest ambition, to attain Gold.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Massengale, Lura
description: Greenwich Village—her goal.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McCalep, J. Burt
description: A newcomer. Has never been known to smile. Another math shark.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McCartney, Paul
description: Vernon Castle II.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McGill, Sarah
description: Rather studious.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McKennon, Joe Lee
description: Joe's dog Spot is quite a favorite at the Pi Phi House.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: McLaughlin, Claire
description: She bobs her hair and burns a lock.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Mendenhall, Ruby
motto: "Being always on the job beats carrying a rabbit's foot for luck."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Metzgar, Emma Louise
description: A sweet, old-fashioned flower growing in a college garden.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Mickel, Melba
motto: "There is no credit in being jolly."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Minnier, George S.
motto: "A gay boy from gay 'Paree'."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Miller, Fanita
motto: "The Physics shark."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Moffitt, James W.
motto: "Dignity is the prerequisite of greatness."
description: Has a soothing voice.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Mitchell, Winnie
motto: "'All virtue lies in individual action, in inward energy, in self-determination.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Montague, Margaret
motto: "'True genius kindles and fair fame inspires.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Murphy, Foy C.
motto: "Whether he is saved or not he has a soul."
description: He likes musicians, especially harpers.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Newman, Stanley M.
motto: "Purely and simply an engineer."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: O'Kelly, J. F.
motto: "Highest thing in dignity."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Parker, Donald
motto: "Deleted by the censor."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Oliver, William L.
motto: "Is trying to take courses in two colleges."
description: Dean Morgan claims him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Pasley, Cecil
motto: "'On that way madness lies; let me shun that.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Paulk, Byron D.
motto: "An ab-Normal student."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Polk, J. T.
motto: "Star of the peanut league."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Prather, Doris
motto: "Found that college life was too strenuous."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Pyles, Helen Louise
motto: "She will try anything once."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Reed, Lloyd
motto: "Strange how the sight of females contracts his facial muscles."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Robinson, Chloe
motto: "Could Bill turn 'er?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Roney, Nannie May
motto: "The only girl member of the mumps club."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Royer, Joe
motto: "Maybe he is—er—er tired, but he is a good dancer anyway."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Sanderson, Sibyl
motto: "Hill Hall niece."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Shaer, Kathleen
motto: "Her heart and hand both open and free, for what she has she freely gives."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Scott, Jean
motto: "Where there is a will, there is a way."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Sellars, Mary Dale
motto: "She is so little, but oh, so bright!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Shinn, William Darrell
motto: "Feels at home among the ladies."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Simms, Mary Charlotte
motto: "Presence of mind is greatly prompted by absence of body."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Simpson, Augusta
motto: "Her bills are due much oftener than the first of the month."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Skaggs, Norris
motto: "Our speed king. Is in the aviation now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Slaughter, Bernice
motto: "Words are like leaves, and where they most abound, much fruit of sense is rarely found."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Smiley, Leona
motto: "His manly form is always at her side."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Stauber, C. A.
description: God made him; therefore let him pass for a man.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Starr, Levi
description: A typical Gray Hall saint.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Towler, H. S.
description: An important man in the school's history.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Trotter, Conner
description: She thinks that measles and an Edison make good company.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Turner, B. B.
description: Is a financier, an orator, and a politician. Is proud of the title.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wade, J. S.
description: Why do the girls call him cute? He is anyway.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wallace, Albert
motto: "He does it with a better grace, but I do it more naturally."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Whittaker, Lee
description: Deserted us to go to France.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wilson, Louise
motto: "Chloera, I know that is a p. f. middy; all that pink stitching proves it to me."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Wilson, A. P.
description: Yes, he is a nice little fellow, too.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Winkleman, Ben
description: Became noted through his clarinet. A football star.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Woodward, S. S.
description: Ye corporal of ye awkward squad.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Deane, Catherine
description: The dropped down among the "W's" to add daintiness to the group. A very modest and retiring.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Woodson, E. M.
description: He of the stately bearing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Johnson, M. D.
description: Byron's brother.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1918.pdf_页面_25.png
